description: Anonymize customer PII in the 'chinook_vendor.db' database (/home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook_vendor.db) to prepare it for external sharing using DBeaver (Connection name: 'ChinookVendor'). Update the 'customers' table with the following rules: FirstName is 'Customer', LastName is 'C' followed by CustomerId zero-padded to 3 digits (e.g., 'C007'), Company is 'REDACTED' if currently present (otherwise NULL), Address is 'REDACTED', Phone and Fax are NULL, and Email is 'customer' + CustomerId + '@example.com'. Do not modify other columns and ensure referential integrity remains intact. Save the SQL script to '/home/ga/Documents/scripts/
